description:
2023 Porsche Cayenne GTS Coupe, 4.0 TC V8 4WD, 453bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 449,000 AED 7,034 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 38,761 KMs - Porsche Warranty Valid Until 20th October 2026 (Extendable) - Full Porsche Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Crayon Exterior - Leather Interior in Black/Silver Houndstooth (Pepita) - Sport Exhaust System incl. Center Mounted Tailpipes in Black - Driver Memory Package - 22" GT Design Wheels incl. Wheel Arch Extensions in Exterior Color - Porsche Crest on Headrests (Front and Rear) - Seat Belts in Chalk - Soft Close Doors - Surround View - Head-Up Display - Lightweight Sport Package - "PORSCHE" Logo and Model Designation in Satin Black - Carbon Fiber Roof - Power Sunblind for Rear Side Windows - Auto-Dimming Mirrors - Interior Trim in Carbon Fiber - Sport Design Exterior Mirrors in High Gloss Black - Navigation Module for Porsche Communication Management (PCM) - LED Headlights in Black incl. Porsche Dynamic Light System (PDLS) - Sport Chrono Package - 4-Zone Climate Control - BOSE® Surround Sound System - Porsche Torque Vectoring Plus (PTV+) - GTS Sport Seats (8-way) - Window Trim in High Gloss Black - Sport Design Package - Sport Design Side Skirts - Door-Sill Guards in Black Brushed Aluminum
